name: From Prediction to Collaboration: Interactive Symbolic Music Analysis

description: arXiv:2607.13587v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Automatic symbolic music analysis has made substantial progress, yet existing systems are typically designed for a single mode of use, such as full-score prediction, and therefore do not match the broader range of operations that arise in analysis workflows, including partial completion, local correction, and iterative refinement. As a result, t...
author: Emmanouil Karystinaios, Johannes Hentschel, Markus Neuwirth, Gerhard Widmer
